news.headline: Zhipu AI market cap tops HK$1 trillion as shares of GLM-5.2 developer soar
news.summary:
The market capitalisation of Hong Kong-listed artificial intelligence pioneer Zhipu AI surpassed HK$1 trillion (US$128 billion) on Monday, fuelled by investor optimism as the company goes head-to-head with its American rivals.

news.headline: One of World Cup's great stories - can Cape Verde become legends?
news.summary: Cape Verde's impressive World Cup continues with a draw against two-time winners Uruguay - and they will now be looking to make the last 32.

news.headline: Largest ever cocaine bust in Australia after police raid underground bunker
news.summary: Police seized 2.7 tonnes of cocaine worth an estimated A$816m after searching a property in western Sydney.
